text: org.springframework.beans.factory.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException: No qualifying bean of type 'com.example.UserService' available: expected at least 1 bean which qualifies as autowire candidate. Dependency annotations: {@org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired(required=true)}
solution: Add @Service, @Component, or @Repository annotation to the class. Ensure component scanning covers the package with @ComponentScan or proper package structure.

text:
org.hibernate.LazyInitializationException: failed to lazily initialize a collection of role: com.example.entity.User.orders, could not initialize proxy - no Session
	at org.hibernate.collection.internal.AbstractPersistentCollection.throwLazyInitializationException(AbstractPersistentCollection.java:612)
solution: Use @Transactional on the service method, use JOIN FETCH in JPQL query, or initialize collection within transaction. Avoid FetchType.EAGER as it causes N+1 problems.

text:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.length()" because "str" is null
	at com.example.service.UserService.processName(UserService.java:42)
	at com.example.controller.UserController.getUser(UserController.java:28)
solution: Add null check before method call: if (str != null). Use Optional.ofNullable() for cleaner handling. Consider using Objects.requireNonNull() for fail-fast validation.

text:
java.util.ConcurrentModificationException
	at java.base/java.util.ArrayList$Itr.checkForComodification(ArrayList.java:1013)
	at java.base/java.util.ArrayList$Itr.next(ArrayList.java:967)
	at com.example.OrderService.processOrders(OrderService.java:55)
solution: Use Iterator.remove() instead of collection.remove() during iteration. Alternative: use CopyOnWriteArrayList for concurrent access, or collect items to remove in separate list first.

text:
java.lang.StackOverflowError
	at com.example.parser.RecursiveParser.parse(RecursiveParser.java:31)
	at com.example.parser.RecursiveParser.parse(RecursiveParser.java:31)
	at com.example.parser.RecursiveParser.parse(RecursiveParser.java:31)
solution: Add base case to stop recursion. Check termination condition is reachable. Consider converting to iterative approach with explicit stack. Increase stack size with -Xss only if recursion depth is intentional.

text:
org.springframework.web.HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException: Request method 'POST' not supported
	at org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.method.RequestMappingInfoHandlerMapping.handleNoMatch(RequestMappingInfoHandlerMapping.java:265)
solution: Verify @GetMapping/@PostMapping/@RequestMapping annotation matches the HTTP method being sent. Check endpoint path for typos. Ensure CORS is configured if calling from different origin.

text:
org.springframework.boot.web.server.PortInUseException: Port 8080 is already in use
	at org.springframework.boot.web.embedded.tomcat.TomcatWebServer.start(TomcatWebServer.java:257)
solution: Find and kill process using port: lsof -i :8080 (Linux/Mac) or netstat -ano | findstr :8080 (Windows). Or change server.port in application.properties to different port.

text:
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.InvalidFormatException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.Integer` from String "abc": not a valid Integer value
	at com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.InvalidFormatException.from(InvalidFormatException.java:67)
solution: Ensure JSON field contains valid integer, not string. Use @JsonFormat for custom parsing. Add custom deserializer for complex cases. Validate input data before deserialization.

text:
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
	at java.base/java.util.Arrays.copyOf(Arrays.java:3720)
	at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.grow(ArrayList.java:265)
solution: Increase heap with -Xmx flag (e.g., -Xmx2g). Check for memory leaks using profiler (VisualVM, JProfiler). Use streaming for large data instead of loading all into memory.

text:
java.lang.ClassNotFoundException: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
	at java.base/jdk.internal.loader.BuiltinClassLoader.loadClass(BuiltinClassLoader.java:641)
	at java.base/jdk.internal.loader.ClassLoaders$AppClassLoader.loadClass(ClassLoaders.java:188)
solution: Add MySQL connector dependency: mysql-connector-java in pom.xml or build.gradle. Verify the JAR is on classpath. For newer MySQL use com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver instead of com.mysql.jdbc.Driver.

text:
org.hibernate.TransientPropertyValueException: object references an unsaved transient instance - save the transient instance before flushing : com.example.entity.Order.customer -> com.example.entity.Customer
	at org.hibernate.engine.spi.CascadingActions$8.noCascade(CascadingActions.java:379)
solution: Save the referenced entity first before saving parent. Or add cascade = CascadeType.PERSIST or CascadeType.ALL to the @ManyToOne/@OneToMany annotation.

text:
org.springframework.beans.factory.BeanCreationException: Error creating bean with name 'entityManagerFactory': Requested bean is currently in creation: Is there an unresolvable circular reference?
	at org.springframework.beans.factory.support.DefaultSingletonBeanRegistry.beforeSingletonCreation(DefaultSingletonBeanRegistry.java:355)
solution: Break circular dependency by using @Lazy on one of the dependencies. Refactor to remove circular dependency. Use setter injection instead of constructor injection for one bean.

text:
java.sql.SQLException: No suitable driver found for jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/mydb
	at java.sql/java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(DriverManager.java:702)
	at java.sql/java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(DriverManager.java:228)
solution: Add PostgreSQL driver dependency (postgresql) to pom.xml. Verify JDBC URL format: jdbc:postgresql://host:port/database. Ensure driver is loaded with Class.forName() if not using JDBC 4.0+.

text:
javax.persistence.OptimisticLockException: Row was updated or deleted by another transaction (or unsaved-value mapping was incorrect)
	at org.hibernate.internal.ExceptionConverterImpl.wrapStaleStateException(ExceptionConverterImpl.java:226)
solution: Implement retry logic for the transaction. Use pessimistic locking (@Lock) for high-contention scenarios. Refresh entity before update. Consider merging changes instead of direct update.

text:
org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException: Access is denied
	at org.springframework.security.access.vote.AffirmativeBased.decide(AffirmativeBased.java:73)
	at org.springframework.security.access.intercept.AbstractSecurityInterceptor.beforeInvocation(AbstractSecurityInterceptor.java:233)
solution: Verify user has required role/authority. Check @PreAuthorize or @Secured annotations. Review SecurityConfig for antMatchers permissions. Ensure authentication is properly set in SecurityContext.

text:
io.jsonwebtoken.ExpiredJwtException: JWT expired at 2024-01-15T10:30:00Z. Current time: 2024-01-15T12:00:00Z
	at io.jsonwebtoken.impl.DefaultJwtParser.parse(DefaultJwtParser.java:385)
solution: Implement refresh token mechanism. Increase token expiration time if appropriate. Handle exception on client side to redirect to login. Consider using sliding expiration.

text:
java.io.FileNotFoundException: config.yaml (No such file or directory)
	at java.base/java.io.FileInputStream.open0(Native Method)
	at java.base/java.io.FileInputStream.open(FileInputStream.java:216)
solution: Use absolute path or verify relative path from working directory. For classpath resources use getClass().getResourceAsStream("/config.yaml"). Check file permissions.

text:
java.net.ConnectException: Connection refused (Connection refused)
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect0(Native Method)
	at java.base/sun.nio.ch.Net.connect(Net.java:579)
solution: Verify target service is running on expected host:port. Check firewall rules. Verify network connectivity with ping/telnet. Ensure correct protocol (http vs https).

text:
java.lang.IllegalStateException: Failed to load ApplicationContext
	at org.springframework.test.context.cache.DefaultCacheAwareContextLoaderDelegate.loadContext(DefaultCacheAwareContextLoaderDelegate.java:98)
	at org.springframework.test.context.support.DefaultTestContext.getApplicationContext(DefaultTestContext.java:124)
solution: Check for configuration errors in application.properties. Verify all required beans are defined. Look at nested exception for root cause. Ensure test profile configuration is correct.

text:
org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: could not execute statement; SQL [n/a]; constraint [UK_user_email]
	at org.springframework.orm.jpa.vendor.HibernateJpaDialect.convertHibernateAccessException(HibernateJpaDialect.java:276)
solution: Unique constraint violated - check if record with same value exists. Verify foreign key references exist. Ensure required (NOT NULL) fields have values.

text:
java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: 'void org.slf4j.spi.LocationAwareLogger.log(org.slf4j.Marker, java.lang.String, int, java.lang.String, java.lang.Object[], java.lang.Throwable)'
	at org.apache.commons.logging.LogAdapter$Slf4jLocationAwareLog.debug(LogAdapter.java:166)
solution: Version mismatch between compile-time and runtime dependencies. Run mvn dependency:tree to find conflicts. Exclude transitive dependency or align versions explicitly.

text:
com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.JsonMappingException: No serializer found for class com.example.dto.UserResponse and no properties discovered to create BeanSerializer
	at com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.InvalidDefinitionException.from(InvalidDefinitionException.java:77)
solution: Add public getters to the class. Or use @JsonAutoDetect(fieldVisibility = ANY). Or configure ObjectMapper with setVisibility. Ensure class is not inner class without static.

text:
org.springframework.web.client.HttpClientErrorException$NotFound: 404 Not Found: [no body]
	at org.springframework.web.client.HttpClientErrorException.create(HttpClientErrorException.java:113)
solution: Verify endpoint URL is correct. Check if resource exists. Ensure correct HTTP method. Review API documentation for required path parameters.

text:
java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 5 out of bounds for length 3
	at com.example.DataProcessor.processArray(DataProcessor.java:42)
	at com.example.Main.main(Main.java:15)
solution: Check array.length before accessing index. Use enhanced for-loop to avoid index issues. Validate input index is within bounds. Consider using List instead of array.

text:
org.springframework.http.converter.HttpMessageNotReadableException: JSON parse error: Cannot deserialize value of type `com.example.dto.UserRequest` from Array value
	at org.springframework.http.converter.json.AbstractJackson2HttpMessageConverter.readJavaType(AbstractJackson2HttpMessageConverter.java:389)
solution: JSON structure doesn't match DTO. Sending array but expecting object or vice versa. Verify Content-Type header is application/json. Validate JSON syntax.

text:
java.lang.NumberFormatException: For input string: "abc"
	at java.base/java.lang.NumberFormatException.forInputString(NumberFormatException.java:67)
	at java.base/java.lang.Integer.parseInt(Integer.java:668)
solution: Validate input is numeric before parsing. Use try-catch for user input. Consider using Apache Commons NumberUtils.toInt() with default value. Trim whitespace from input.

text:
org.springframework.transaction.UnexpectedRollbackException: Transaction silently rolled back because it has been marked as rollback-only
	at org.springframework.transaction.support.AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.processRollback(AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.java:870)
solution: Exception occurred in nested @Transactional method causing rollback. Check inner method exceptions. Use propagation = REQUIRES_NEW for independent transaction. Review rollbackFor settings.

text:
java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException: null
	at java.base/java.util.AbstractList.add(AbstractList.java:153)
	at java.base/java.util.AbstractList.add(AbstractList.java:111)
solution: Arrays.asList() returns fixed-size list that cannot be modified. Wrap in new ArrayList<>(Arrays.asList(...)) for mutable list. Or use List.of() and explicitly create ArrayList.

text:
org.springframework.beans.factory.UnsatisfiedDependencyException: Error creating bean with name 'userController': Unsatisfied dependency expressed through field 'userService'
	at org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.AutowiredAnnotationBeanPostProcessor$AutowiredFieldElement.resolveFieldValue(AutowiredAnnotationBeanPostProcessor.java:660)
solution: Ensure the dependency bean exists with correct annotation (@Service, @Component). Check component scan path includes the package. Verify no circular dependencies.

text:
org.hibernate.MappingException: Unknown entity: com.example.entity.User
	at org.hibernate.metamodel.internal.MetamodelImpl.entityPersister(MetamodelImpl.java:704)
solution: Add @Entity annotation to the class. Ensure entity is in package scanned by JPA (@EntityScan). Verify persistence.xml includes the entity class.

text:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unknown return value type: java.lang.String
	at org.springframework.web.method.support.HandlerMethodReturnValueHandlerComposite.handleReturnValue(HandlerMethodReturnValueHandlerComposite.java:80)
solution: Add @ResponseBody annotation or use @RestController instead of @Controller. Return ResponseEntity for more control. Ensure Jackson is on classpath for JSON serialization.

text:
com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonParseException: Unexpected character ('"' (code 34)): was expecting comma to separate Object entries
	at com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonParser._constructError(JsonParser.java:2391)
solution: Malformed JSON - missing comma, extra comma, or syntax error. Validate JSON with online validator. Check for unescaped quotes in string values. Ensure proper encoding.

text:
org.springframework.web.servlet.NoHandlerFoundException: No handler found for GET /api/users
	at org.springframework.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet.noHandlerFound(DispatcherServlet.java:1278)
solution: Verify @RequestMapping path matches URL. Check controller has @RestController or @Controller annotation. Ensure component scan includes controller package. Check for typos in URL.

text:
java.time.format.DateTimeParseException: Text '2024-01-15' could not be parsed at index 0
	at java.base/java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.parseResolved0(DateTimeFormatter.java:2052)
solution: Date format doesn't match pattern. Use correct DateTimeFormatter pattern (yyyy-MM-dd vs dd/MM/yyyy). Consider using ISO_LOCAL_DATE for standard formats.

text:
org.postgresql.util.PSQLException: ERROR: relation "users" does not exist
	at org.postgresql.core.v3.QueryExecutorImpl.receiveErrorResponse(QueryExecutorImpl.java:2675)
solution: Table doesn't exist in database. Run migrations or create table. Check schema name if using non-public schema. Verify database connection is to correct database.

text:
org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public ResponseEntity: [Field error in object 'userRequest' on field 'email': rejected value [null]]
	at org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.method.annotation.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor.resolveArgument(RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor.java:141)
solution: Request body validation failed. Add @Valid annotation to controller parameter. Check @NotNull, @NotBlank constraints on DTO. Return proper error response with field errors.

text:
java.lang.ClassCastException: class java.lang.String cannot be cast to class java.lang.Integer
	at com.example.service.DataService.processData(DataService.java:45)
solution: Check type before casting with instanceof. Use generics to avoid raw type casts. Review the data source to ensure correct types. Consider using wrapper methods with proper typing.

text: org.springframework.web.multipart.MaxUploadSizeExceededException: Maximum upload size exceeded; nested exception is java.lang.IllegalStateException: org.apache.tomcat.util.http.fileupload.impl.SizeLimitExceededException
solution: Increase limit in application.properties: spring.servlet.multipart.max-file-size=10MB and spring.servlet.multipart.max-request-size=10MB. Handle exception with @ExceptionHandler.

text:
org.springframework.orm.jpa.JpaSystemException: ids for this class must be manually assigned before calling save()
	at org.springframework.orm.jpa.vendor.HibernateJpaDialect.convertHibernateAccessException(HibernateJpaDialect.java:321)
solution: Entity ID is not auto-generated. Add @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY) to @Id field. Or manually set ID before saving.

text:
java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: Could not initialize class org.apache.logging.log4j.util.PropertiesUtil
	at org.apache.logging.log4j.status.StatusLogger.<clinit>(StatusLogger.java:71)
solution: Class was present at compile time but missing at runtime. Check for dependency conflicts. Ensure all transitive dependencies are included. Clean and rebuild project.

text:
org.springframework.data.mapping.PropertyReferenceException: No property 'findByName' found for type 'User'
	at org.springframework.data.mapping.PropertyPath.<init>(PropertyPath.java:90)
solution: Repository method name doesn't match entity property. Verify property name exists in entity (case-sensitive). Check method naming convention: findByPropertyName.

text:
javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target
	at java.base/sun.security.ssl.Alert.createSSLException(Alert.java:131)
solution: SSL certificate not trusted. Import certificate to Java truststore with keytool. For testing, configure to trust all certificates (not for production). Use valid CA-signed certificate.

text:
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: GC overhead limit exceeded
	at java.base/java.util.HashMap.resize(HashMap.java:704)
	at java.base/java.util.HashMap.putVal(HashMap.java:629)
solution: JVM spending >98% time in GC. Increase heap size. Check for memory leaks with profiler. Review code creating many objects. Consider weak references for caches.

text:
org.springframework.web.HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException: Content type 'text/plain;charset=UTF-8' not supported
	at org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.method.annotation.AbstractMessageConverterMethodArgumentResolver.readWithMessageConverters(AbstractMessageConverterMethodArgumentResolver.java:207)
solution: Set Content-Type header to application/json. Add consumes attribute to @RequestMapping if expecting specific type. Ensure request body is valid JSON.

text:
java.util.zip.ZipException: invalid stored block lengths
	at java.base/java.util.zip.InflaterInputStream.read(InflaterInputStream.java:165)
	at java.base/java.util.zip.GZIPInputStream.read(GZIPInputStream.java:118)
solution: Corrupted or invalid compressed file. Check file was fully downloaded. Verify file is actually compressed (not renamed). Try re-downloading or re-compressing source.

text:
io.jsonwebtoken.security.WeakKeyException: The signing key's size is 128 bits which is not secure enough for the HS256 algorithm
	at io.jsonwebtoken.security.Keys.hmacShaKeyFor(Keys.java:96)
solution: JWT secret key too short. HS256 requires at least 256 bits (32 bytes). Generate longer secret key. Use Keys.secretKeyFor(SignatureAlgorithm.HS256) for proper key generation.

text:
org.springframework.beans.ConversionNotSupportedException: Failed to convert property value of type 'java.lang.String' to required type 'java.time.LocalDate'
	at org.springframework.beans.AbstractNestablePropertyAccessor.convertIfNecessary(AbstractNestablePropertyAccessor.java:595)
solution: Add @DateTimeFormat(pattern = "yyyy-MM-dd") to LocalDate field. Or register custom converter. For JSON, use @JsonFormat annotation with date pattern.

text:
org.hibernate.StaleObjectStateException: Row was updated or deleted by another transaction (or unsaved-value mapping was incorrect) : [com.example.entity.User#1]
	at org.hibernate.event.internal.DefaultMergeEventListener.entityIsDetached(DefaultMergeEventListener.java:308)
solution: Optimistic locking conflict. Reload entity before update. Implement merge strategy. Use @Version for optimistic locking. Consider pessimistic lock for high contention.

text:
org.springframework.context.ApplicationContextException: Unable to start web server; nested exception is org.springframework.boot.web.server.WebServerException: Unable to start embedded Tomcat
	at org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.context.ServletWebServerApplicationContext.onRefresh(ServletWebServerApplicationContext.java:163)
solution: Check nested exception for root cause. Common causes: port in use, missing servlet dependency, configuration error. Verify spring-boot-starter-web is included.

text:
java.lang.InterruptedException: sleep interrupted
	at java.base/java.lang.Thread.sleep(Native Method)
	at com.example.service.AsyncService.processAsync(AsyncService.java:28)
solution: Thread was interrupted during sleep/wait. Handle gracefully by checking Thread.interrupted(). Restore interrupt status with Thread.currentThread().interrupt(). Consider using CompletableFuture.
